class.name: serl_franka_ros2_control/SerlCartesianImpedanceController
class.description: SERL-style Cartesian impedance torque controller with realtime reference limiting for Franka ROS2.

class.name: serl_franka_ros2_control/JointSineTorqueTestController
class.description: Minimal guarded joint effort sine controller for Franka ROS2 effort-path debugging.
